1.title: User Personas & Access Rules
1.instruction: Define who can ride (residents vs visitors), age/ID verification, service areas, and hours of operation. Note any local regulations (helmet, sidewalk restrictions).

2.title: Station & Inventory Model
2.instruction: Describe how stations and bikes are represented (location, capacity, bike types), docking rules, and expectations for rebalancing when stations fill or empty.

3.title: Unlock & Ride Flow
3.instruction: Explain how riders start a trip (app scan/kiosk), grace periods, ride time limits, pausing a ride, and what data must be captured during a trip (location, battery level for e-bikes).

4.title: Pricing, Deposits, and Penalties
4.instruction: Set the pricing model (membership vs pay-per-ride), deposits/holds, overage fees, late return penalties, lost/damaged bike handling, and discounts (students, off-peak).

5.title: Incidents & Support
5.instruction: Define how riders report issues (flat tire, broken dock), what happens to ongoing rides during incidents, SLA expectations for resolution, and notification rules for safety or service outages.
